diagrams.title: Jordan Block Structure
diagrams.description: A single Jordan block Jₖ(λ) showing the diagonal eigenvalue and superdiagonal 1's
elements: 1's on positions (i,i+1) for i=1 to k-1
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic building block of JCF

diagrams.title: Jordan Chain of Generalized Eigenvectors
diagrams.description: Chain of 3 generalized eigenvectors showing how (A-λI) maps each to previous
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how to find generalized eigenvectors for building blocks

diagrams.title: Full Jordan Matrix Example
diagrams.description: A 5×5 Jordan form with mixed eigenvalues and block sizes
diagrams.purpose: Seeing complete JCF with multiple blocks for same eigenvalue

diagrams.title: AM vs GM Visualization
diagrams.description: Comparing eigenvalue with AM=4, GM=2 showing two Jordan blocks of sizes 2 and 2
elements: Eigenvalue λ appears 4 times in characteristic polynomial
diagrams.purpose: Understanding relationship between multiplicities and block structure
